sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104535" key="tra/nwma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρᾱ´ν-ωμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n104535.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">that which is made clear,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τρανώματα γλώσσης</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:4:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.11</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
